summary: RAGFlow knowledge-driven template code, contract, evidence chain, browser acceptance, generated-image GET, and privacy checks pass on branch. Do not merge main automatically.

subagent_reviews.finding: CODEGRAPH_REPORT.md still used old 8792 / trace_498493fb085144d8ac success as current evidence; ledger old success rows could be misread.
subagent_reviews.repair: CODEGRAPH_REPORT.md now records the accepted 8793 browser run trace_5b17210c1a3a4d0587 and marks old 8792 evidence historical; evidence summaries describe one accepted run.

subagent_reviews.finding: RAGFlow enhancement validation did not reject primary/auxiliary/priority/weight binding semantics in allowed text fields.
subagent_reviews.repair: src/core/ragflow-enhancement.js now discards binding-decision semantics; tests/unit/image-api.test.js covers English and Chinese primary/auxiliary/weight cases.

subagent_reviews.finding: Previous evidence only supported provider blocked; screenshot files were named .png but contained JPEG bytes.
subagent_reviews.repair: Provider later produced accepted browser success on 8793; generated image GET returned 200 image/png no-store; screenshot files were converted to PNG.

subagent_reviews.finding: No page, response, or evidence leakage found; untracked local config file should not be committed.
subagent_reviews.repair: 真实配置.json added to .gitignore; evidence stores only boolean provider config presence and sanitized run metadata.

subagent_reviews.finding: Branch was correct and main was not merged, but evidence chain and status commands needed refresh.
subagent_reviews.repair: Evidence chain refreshed to one accepted browser run; required commands must be rerun before commit and push.

second_round_reviews.details: Current browser evidence points to 8793 / trace_5b17210c1a3a4d0587; old 8792 / trace_498493fb085144d8ac evidence is historical only; both network summaries are byte-identical.

second_round_reviews.finding: No remaining contract or leakage blocker.
second_round_reviews.details: Binding-decision semantics are discarded as binding_decision; minimal Prompt Compiler fallback remains intact; evidence and reports do not expose internal prompts, provider payloads, base64, keys, tokens, or raw responses.

evidence.details: Visible page submitted character_multiview to POST /api/v1/image-generations on http://127.0.0.1:8793/; trace_5b17210c1a3a4d0587 returned status=succeeded with image_count=1.
HTTP 200, Content-Type image/png, Content-Length 1999538, Cache-Control no-store, PNG magic bytes verified.
Both screenshot artifacts are PNG files.

decision: PASS_ON_BRANCH. Commit and push to codex/ragflow-knowledge-driven-template only; main merge remains no.

command_results.details: Node syntax checks passed for server, routes, providers, core modules, and storage.
Review gate passed with zero blocking findings.
CodeGraph initialized and pendingChanges added=0 modified=0 removed=0.
Reviewed before commit; only expected branch files are modified and local sensitive config is ignored.
